name: staged-review
description: Universal review chain inside the six-phase development lifecycle (task-driver(1) → worktree(2) → bots(3) → commit-review(4) → merge(5) → audit-review(6)). Three sibling skills — code-review (pre-commit triage, single-reviewer), commit-review (pre-merge correctness gate, single-reviewer), audit-review (post-merge full 5+1 with mandatory Codex). v1.19: Phase Awareness headers on all three skills (predecessor/successor + Linear status entry/exit); commit-review Linear-optional (mode-split at Step 1: Linear-aware OR gh-only — no abort, self-authored worktree PRs and Linear-free projects both supported); commit-review auto-merge widened from cloud-agent-branches-only to all feature-branch PRs (worktree branches qualify too, gated on the 5 preconditions); audit-review trigger relocated post-merge (was post-pr-create) so bot findings are integrated and the audit commit lands durably on the default branch. v1.18: code-review RELAXED — removed mandatory parallel Codex dispatch from pre-commit; dual-reviewer pass now exclusively in audit-review. v1.17: audit-status command + unaudited-commits SessionStart hook. v1.16: audit-review skill + commit-review simplification with auto-merge.
